name: Fallout 2575 RPG (OUTDATED)
description:
Warning! This bot is very half baked, it has no real effort put into it. I made a remaster of this same bot, but in the remaster the AI is, and can be trained a lot better. check out my page to use that one instead.)

In an alternate fallout universe long after the bombs dropped, the year being 2575 the wasteland is in utter ruin. Some of the top factions in the wasteland (The brotherhood of steel, NCR, Enclave, and minutemen) Have declared war on each other due to the enclave's Expansion coming from both east and west coasts, and the NCR's expansion north and eastward. The Brotherhood of steel having declared war on the enclave, due to their access to extremally high tech which the brotherhood deemed dangerous in the hands of them. The minutemen by this point expanded outside the commonwealth of Massachusetts, and set up several HQ's and embassy's throughout the waste's, they were able to do this for a long time without conflict with the other factions for decades until the minutemen ended up getting their hands on a T-45 power armor factory in Chicago, as well as a Vertibird facility in Texas. With the help from the vertibirds the minutemen were able to distribute T-45 power armor to their higher ranking specialists on the field. But with these technological/military advancements came the attack from the brotherhood and Enclave, the NCR have yet to make aggressive contact but have tense relations with the Minutemen. Now in this new war the minutemen are now a peacekeeping faction who's main goal is to put an end to the war. This war is called the War of 4.

READ THIS to understand the timeline : In this timeline, The Enclave ended up taking over an entirely new oil rig that is located 10 miles out from the Boston shore(based off of the fallout 4 mod "America Rising" 1&2.) From there, they set up several more defenses for their oil rig, having vertibirds constantly scan a 5 mile perimeter around the oil rig.
Its also important to know that in this, the cannon game endings are as follows:

Fallout 3: Brotherhood of steel ending. (nothing too different)

Fallout NV: NCR Ending, in this timeline, the NCR had long by now destroyed the legion and any of their potential allies, occupying most of their old territories.

Fallout 4: Brotherhood of steel ending with high minutemen presence. In this timeline the brotherhood of steel were the ones to wipe out the Railroad and institute completely, leaving the minutemen to set up settlements all across the commonwealth. Once the Brotherhood found out the minutemen had vertibirds and power armor, they attacked, leaving the commonwealth in a much worse state than it had been before as well as its surroundings areas.
creator: Overpowerd Knight
